result:
All tasks complete and validated. The final state is green (workspace build + all server/parser suites + graph fixtures), and the report is written to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/INTEGRATION_REPORT.md`.

Vendored graph-clean (837 LOC) and web-clean (1005 LOC) into crates/tamarin-server/src/{graph_clean,web_clean}/ as headerless in-crate modules; only mechanical crate::->super:: fix (+ one doctest fence in mod.rs). Wired both into lib.rs.
Vendored copies verified byte-identical to originals modulo the path fix; clean crates' own suites pass (graph-clean 24 tests, web-clean parity) and the 19 vendored web_clean inline tests pass inside tamarin-server.
WEB rewired (byte-safe): intdot handler -> web_clean::intdot; overview_page local-origin shell -> web_clean::page with opaque west/center panes; add/delete forms -> web_clean::forms. Deleted ported add_lemma_html + delete_lemma_html + intdot template (~58 GPL LOC).
WEB kept+reported: overview non-local branch (clean shell bakes in local-only header actions), edit_lemma_html (clean edit_form hard-codes rows="8" vs HS dynamic textHeight), and proof_state + main-view bodies remain as the opaque prover-content suppliers — so theory_html.rs is not deleted.
WEB not-forced: json_resp envelopes + 404 page are byte-compatible with web_clean, but rewiring is pure return-type/plumbing churn (axum Json across ~40 sites, extra {alert} variant, no request path in scope) with no structural-gate win.
GRAPH: graph_clean vendored + validated, but the DOT-pipeline rewire is BLOCKED and reported, not forced; handlers/dot.rs and graph/abbreviation.rs kept intact (headers untouched, abbreviation.rs NOT deleted) per the protocol's leave-old-path-and-report clause.
Blocker 1: term-rendering + abbreviation are one coupled behavior graph_clean omits (record-cell text is a documented GAP; its abbrev works on an independent Term model and cannot substitute names into the ported LNTerm balanced-wrap renderer).
Blocker 2: graph_clean has no shape for HS trapezium/invtrapezium missing-nodes (Ellipse emits shape="ellipse" only); adding one would be patching clean code.
Blocker 3: graph_clean takes ids/ports verbatim and does not model HS's graph-global <n0..> port/node-id allocation, which lives in the ported serializer being deleted (transplanting it is forbidden).
A byte-faithful graph rewire would GROW dot.rs (adapter over a still-live serializer), not thin it; recommended graph_clean round-2: add shape= support, an id/port allocator, and an LNTerm bridge or accepted term GAP.
Validation all green: cargo build --workspace 0 errors; cargo test -p tamarin-server all suites (lib 80 incl. 19 web_clean, integration 53, doctest ignored); cargo test -p tamarin-parser green; graph fixture tests green; captured-HS parity fixtures stay green.
Report at /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/INTEGRATION_REPORT.md. LOC: +1842 vendored (headerless) and ~35 adapter glue; -58 GPL render logic; tracked-file diff +82/-70 across theory.rs, theory_html.rs, lib.rs.
